inputs.name: importance
inputs.description: Defines the `Important` label of the item.

inputs.name: loading
inputs.description: Defines if a busy indicator would be displayed over the item.

inputs.name: loadingDelay
inputs.description: Defines the delay in milliseconds, after which the busy indicator will show up for this component.

inputs.name: read
inputs.description:
Defines if the `notification` is new or has been already read.

*Note:** if set to `false` the `titleText` has bold font,
if set to true - it has a normal font.

inputs.name: showClose
inputs.description: Defines if the `Close` button would be displayed.

inputs.name: state
inputs.description: Defines the status indicator of the item.

inputs.name: wrappingType
inputs.description:
Defines if the `titleText` and `description` should wrap,
they truncate by default.

*Note:** by default the `titleText` and `description`,
and a `ShowMore/Less` button would be displayed.

outputs.name: ui5Close
outputs.description: Fired when the `Close` button is pressed.
